services.title: Feasibility & Concept Development
services.description: Feasibility studies, concept design, and techno-economic analysis to define technically and financially viable project solutions.

services.title: Process Technology & System Selection
services.description: Technology selection including MBR, MBBR, SBR, RO, and ZLD based on project requirements and regulatory standards.

services.title: Engineering Design & Documentation
services.description: Basic and detailed engineering including PFD, P&ID, hydraulic design, BOQ preparation, and tender engineering support.

services.title: Bid Evaluation & Commissioning Advisory
services.description: Bid evaluation, vendor review, commissioning advisory, and performance validation for optimized project outcomes.
